schema.name: CloudflareAuditLog_CL
schema.description: Cloudflare account audit log events capturing actions taken against the Cloudflare account, including user logins, setting changes, DNS updates, firewall rule modifications, and more.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp of when the action was logged, extracted from action.time.

columns.name: Id
columns.description: A unique identifier for the audit log entry.

columns.name: Account
columns.description: An object containing account information. Includes 'id' (unique account identifier) and 'name' (account name).

columns.name: Action
columns.description: An object describing the action performed. Includes 'description' (short description of the action), 'result' (string: 'success' or 'failure'), 'time' (ISO 8601 timestamp when the action was logged), and 'type' (action category: 'create', 'delete', 'update', or 'view').

columns.name: Actor
columns.description: An object describing who performed the action. Includes 'id' (actor user ID), 'context' (how the actor authenticated: 'api_key', 'api_token', 'dash', 'oauth', or 'dash_sso'), 'email' (actor email address), 'ip_address' (IP address of the request), 'token_id' (API token ID when context is api_token or oauth), 'token_name' (API token name), and 'type' (actor type: 'account', 'cloudflare_admin', 'system', or 'user').

columns.name: Raw
columns.description: An object containing raw HTTP request and response details. Includes 'cf_ray_id' (Cloudflare Ray ID), 'method' (HTTP method), 'status_code' (HTTP response status code), 'uri' (request URI), and 'user_agent' (client user agent string).

columns.name: Resource
columns.description: An object describing the affected resource. Includes 'id' (resource identifier), 'product' (Cloudflare product associated with the resource), 'request' (raw request body), 'response' (raw response body), 'scope' (resource scope), and 'type' (resource type).

columns.name: Zone
columns.description: An object containing zone information associated with the action. Includes 'id' (zone identifier) and 'name' (zone name, e.g. 'example.com').
